title: USDA Releases Results of the 2011 Certified Organic Production Survey
summary: U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA)-certified organic growers in the United States sold more than $3.5 billion organically grown agricultural commodities in 2011, according to the results of the 2011 Certified Organic Production Survey, released today by USDA's National Agricultural Statistics Ser...

title: NASS Expands Quick Stats 2.0 Products, Retires Quick Stats 1.0
summary: In order to streamline operations and to improve statistical services, USDA's National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) has enhanced its Quick Stats 2.0 data query tool and is retiring the Quick Stats 1.0 service on Oct. 30, 2012. All data previously published in that database are now availabl...
